bl=bl-1 e(d)else local d,e,l=i[bg],i[be],i[x]local e=v[e]local d=a[d]for s=1,#e do if d==nil then break end d=d[u[e[s]]]end a[l]=d end end end else if n>=30 then if n<=32 then if n<=31 then if n==(0+(30))then do local d=(a[i[bg]])by=(d and(i[be])or by)end else a[i[bg]]=br(t[i[be]],nil,k)end else do return a[i[bg]]end end else if n==(0+(33))then local d,e=i[bg],i[be]local e=v[e]local l={}do
